description: Multi-factor stock selection + cross-asset risk parity with regime-adaptive defensive rotation.

how_it_works.overview: Multi-factor stock momentum + cross-asset risk parity with regime-adaptive hedging.
how_it_works.stock_selection: Top 30 stocks by momentum × quality × persistence, weighted by inverse volatility.
how_it_works.regime_detection: SPY vs 100-day SMA determines bull (80% equity) vs bear (30% equity).
how_it_works.safe_havens: TLT, GLD, IEF weighted by inverse vol. In bear, trend-filtered: only boost havens above their SMA200.
how_it_works.rebalance: Monthly (1st trading day). Execute at next-day open with 5bps slippage.
how_it_works.edge: Combines stock-level alpha (momentum-quality) with macro hedging (bonds/gold). Always invested, never cash.
